title: papaver somniferum subvar. atroviolaceum
intro: Papaver somniferum subvar. atroviolaceum, also known as the opium poppy, is a subvariety of the opium poppy plant that is characterized by its deep purple-black seeds and dark foliage. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Papaver somniferum subvar. atroviolaceum include relief from pain, insomnia, and anxiety, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of the plant's seeds, leaves, and roots can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
